name: event-planning-ai
description: Event Planning Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: calculate_venue_capacity
tools.description: Calculate venue capacity for different seating layouts.

tools.name: plan_budget
tools.description: Create an event budget plan with cost breakdowns and tracking.

tools.name: optimize_schedule
tools.description: Optimize event schedule with breaks, room assignments, and time slots.

tools.name: manage_guest_list
tools.description: Manage guest list with RSVP tracking, dietary needs, and table assignments.

tools.name: estimate_catering
tools.description: Estimate catering costs and quantities for an event.
